person.name: Rohit Kumar Upadhyay
person.headline: Building backend systems that scale to millions—without breaking under pressure.
person.summary: Backend engineer focused on high-scale microservices and performance-driven design, building systems that power 10M+ users

strengths.title: Backend Development
strengths.desc: Building scalable backend services using Java, Spring Boot, and Microservices Architecture.

strengths.title: REST API Design
strengths.desc: Designing maintainable & scalable APIs with validation and clean service boundaries.

strengths.title: Search Systems
strengths.desc: Developing Elasticsearch-powered discovery services with filtering, fuzzy search, and sorting.

strengths.title: Database Engineering
strengths.desc: Working with MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis caching, and relational data models.

strengths.title: Production Debugging
strengths.desc: Handling deployments, debugging live issues, and performing root cause analysis.

strengths.title: System Design
strengths.desc: Applying distributed systems and modular architecture principles for scalable platforms.

resume.experience_snapshot: Backend engineer building scalable Java microservices for a platform serving 11.8M+ users.
